_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of information security program management and project management principles and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (prompt injection, insecure output handling, training data poisoning, model theft, excessive agency).
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-001 (OP, cosine: 0.438), OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.306). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, security]. DCWF-only terms [information, management, principles, program, project, techniques] vs WIDAI-only terms [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.872, R=0.829). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of information security program management and project management prin" and "Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 f". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 > STS 0.306 (gap +0.166). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, security] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, security]. DCWF-only: [information, management, principles, program, project, techniques]. WIDAI-only: [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling].
